channel.title: Alan Watts YouTube Sources
channel.description: Alan Watts talks added from official Be Here Now Network YouTube sources.
channel.itunes:author: Alan Watts
channel.itunes:summary: Alan Watts talks added from official Be Here Now Network YouTube sources.

item.title: Myth of Myself
item.description: Alan Watts explores identity, purpose, myths of the self, floodlight consciousness, and how human beings grow out of the world. Source: YouTube / Being in the Way Podcast Ep. 24. This feed version begins at 01:15 of the source video.
item.itunes:summary: Alan Watts explores identity, purpose, myths of the self, floodlight consciousness, and how human beings grow out of the world. This feed version begins at 01:15 of the source video.
